assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, and specifically mentions how dev clusters get 1.32 first as canaries before prod

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions resource requests are mandatory, no SSH access to nodes, and notes that node management is handled by Google in Autopilot

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl commands for checking deprecated API usage: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated'

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'ALL containers have resource requests (mandatory - pods will be rejected without them)' with a kubectl command to check for missing requests

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes checks for PDBs, bare pods detection, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds validation with specific kubectl commands

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_NAME --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health validation including deployment replica counts, pod status checks, statefulsets, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions dev clusters serve as canaries with 1.32 already deployed, and includes dev workload validation completion as a pre-upgrade requirement

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking GKE release schedule for advance notice beyond the 72h notification period
Includes comprehensive monitoring validation in both pre and post-upgrade checklists covering Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, metrics collection, and performance baselines

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Only discusses cluster-level maintenance exclusions for controlling upgrade timing, does not recommend node-level exclusions, which is appropriate for Autopilot
